name: Taking objects
description:
In this room, there is an object in the floor. To see the objects
in a room, just type 'l' or 'look'. To take the objects, type 
'get OBJECT NAME'. To get all the objects in the room. type 'get all'. 
The object will go to your inventary. E.G.: get sunglass.
Type 'n' to continue.
